```{r choice_rt_figure, cache=F, fig.width=8}
  scale_fill_manual(
  name = "Part 1 choice:",
  values = c(
    mean_mychoice  = "#ff7f0e",   
    mean_comchoice = "#FA938E",   
    mean_nochoice  =  "#84B0FE"  
  ),
  labels = c(
    mean_mychoice  = "Participant Choice",
    mean_comchoice = "Computer Choice",
    mean_nochoice  = "Neither"
  )
) +
  labs(
    title = "Median RT by Part 2 Choice by Part 1 Choice",
    x = "Chosen in Part 1 by:",
    y = "Median RT (ms)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.8, hjust = 0.5)
  )

p

```



```{r reconstruction_accuracy,  cache=F, fig.width=8}

part1_choices <- phase_1_df %>%
  select(subj_id, trial_num, part1_chose_gems = chose_gems)

phase_2_merged_df <- phase_2_df %>%
  left_join(part1_choices, by = c("subj_id", "trial_num"))

data_for_test <- phase_2_merged_df %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial, !is.na(part1_chose_gems))

long_paired_data_all <- data_for_test %>%
  group_by(subj_id, part1_chose_gems) %>%
  summarise(mean_accuracy = mean(is_consistent, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    phase_1_choice = factor(part1_chose_gems, labels = c("Did Not Choose Gems", "Chose Gems")),
    group = "all"
  )

r_long_paired_data <- data_for_test %>%
  filter(mentioned_rule) %>%
  group_by(subj_id, part1_chose_gems) %>%
  summarise(mean_accuracy = mean(is_consistent, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    phase_1_choice = factor(part1_chose_gems, labels = c("Did Not Choose Gems", "Chose Gems")),
    group = "r_mentioned"
  )

nr_long_paired_data <- data_for_test %>%
  filter(!mentioned_rule) %>%
  group_by(subj_id, part1_chose_gems) %>%
  summarise(mean_accuracy = mean(is_consistent, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    phase_1_choice = factor(part1_chose_gems, labels = c("Did Not Choose Gems", "Chose Gems")),
    group = "nr_not_mentioned"
  )

plot_data_summary_all <- long_paired_data_all %>%
  group_by(group, phase_1_choice) %>%
  summarise(
    grand_mean_accuracy = mean(mean_accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    sem = sd(mean_accuracy, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

r_plot_data_summary <- r_long_paired_data %>%
  group_by(group, phase_1_choice) %>%
  summarise(
    grand_mean_accuracy = mean(mean_accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    sem = sd(mean_accuracy, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

nr_plot_data_summary <- nr_long_paired_data %>%
  group_by(group, phase_1_choice) %>%
  summarise(
    grand_mean_accuracy = mean(mean_accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    sem = sd(mean_accuracy, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_data_summary <- bind_rows(plot_data_summary_all,
                               r_plot_data_summary,
                               nr_plot_data_summary) %>%
  mutate(group = factor(group, levels = c("all", "r_mentioned", "nr_not_mentioned")))

long_subject_all <- long_paired_data_all
long_subject_r   <- r_long_paired_data
long_subject_nr  <- nr_long_paired_data

y_limits <- c(0, 1)

build_group_plot <- function(summary_df, subject_df, plot_title, bar_color) {
  ggplot(summary_df, aes(x = phase_1_choice, y = grand_mean_accuracy)) +
    geom_line(data = subject_df,
              aes(x = phase_1_choice, y = mean_accuracy, group = subj_id),
              color = "gray70", alpha = 0.4, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    geom_point(data = subject_df,
               aes(x = phase_1_choice, y = mean_accuracy, group = subj_id),
               color = "gray70", alpha = 0.4, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    # bars
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.6, fill = bar_color) +
    # error bars
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = grand_mean_accuracy - sem, ymax = grand_mean_accuracy + sem),
                  width = 0.2, color = "black") +
    labs(title = plot_title,
         x = "Choice in Phase 1",
         y = "Mean Phase 2 Accuracy") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = y_limits, expand = c(0, 0)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"))
}

# --- create each plot ---
plot_all <- build_group_plot(plot_data_summary_all, long_subject_all,
                             "All participants", "#4C72B0")

plot_r <- build_group_plot(r_plot_data_summary, long_subject_r,
                           "Position mentioned", "#55A868")

plot_nr <- build_group_plot(nr_plot_data_summary, long_subject_nr,
                            "Position NOT mentioned", "#C44E52")

print(plot_all)
print(plot_r)
print(plot_nr)

plot_data_paired <- data_for_test %>%
  group_by(subj_id, mentioned_rule, part1_chose_gems) %>%
  summarise(recon_acc = mean(is_consistent, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

group_summary_new <- plot_data_paired %>%
  group_by(mentioned_rule, part1_chose_gems) %>%
  summarise(
    m = mean(recon_acc, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(recon_acc, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(p1_label = ifelse(part1_chose_gems, "Part1: correct", "Part1: incorrect"),
         p1_label = factor(p1_label, levels = c("Part1: incorrect","Part1: correct")))

plot_pairs_new <- plot_data_paired %>%
  mutate(p1_label = ifelse(part1_chose_gems, "Part1: correct", "Part1: incorrect")) %>%
  mutate(p1_label = factor(p1_label, levels = c("Part1: incorrect","Part1: correct")))

library(scales)

p <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = plot_pairs_new, aes(x = p1_label, y = recon_acc, group = subj_id),
            color = "grey70", alpha = 0.35, size = 0.4) +
  geom_point(data = plot_pairs_new, aes(x = p1_label, y = recon_acc),
             color = "grey40", alpha = 0.6, position = position_dodge(width = 0.4), size = 1.7) +
  geom_point(data = group_summary_new, aes(x = p1_label, y = m, color = mentioned_rule),
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.4), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(data = group_summary_new, aes(x = p1_label, ymin = m - se, ymax = m + se, color = mentioned_rule),
                width = 0.12, position = position_dodge(width = 0.4), size = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ mentioned_rule, nrow = 1,
             labeller = as_labeller(c("FALSE" = "Did NOT mention position", "TRUE" = "Mentioned position"))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.25,1), breaks = seq(0,1,0.25), labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL,
       y = "Reconstruction accuracy (Part 2)",
       title = "Reconstruction accuracy in Part 2 by Part 1 guess accuracy",
       color = "Mentioned rule") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10))


print(p)



```




```{r probability,  cache=F, fig.width=8}


h6_viz_data <- is_not_consistent_chosegems_part1 %>%
  # Create trial bins
  mutate(
    trial_bin = cut(
      trial_num,
      breaks = c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50),
      labels = c("1-10", "11-20", "21-30", "31-40", "41-50")
    )
  ) %>%
  
  group_by(trial_bin, mentioned_rule, subj_id) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    prob_stones = mean(chose_onlystones_part2, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sqrt(prob_stones * (1 - prob_stones) / n)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    ci_lower = prob_stones - 1.96 * se,
    ci_upper = prob_stones + 1.96 * se
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    Group = ifelse(mentioned_rule, "Position mentioned", "Position NOT mentioned")
  ) 


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

h6_subject_bin <- is_not_consistent_chosegems_part1 %>%
  mutate(
    trial_bin = cut(
      trial_num,
      breaks = c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50),
      labels = c("1-10", "11-20", "21-30", "31-40", "41-50"),
      right = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(subj_id, trial_bin, mentioned_rule) %>%
  summarise(
    prob_stones = mean(chose_onlystones_part2, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_trials = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = ifelse(mentioned_rule, "Position mentioned", "Position NOT mentioned"),
    trial_bin = factor(trial_bin, levels = c("1-10","11-20","21-30","31-40","41-50"))
  )

summary_df <- h6_subject_bin %>%
  group_by(trial_bin, Group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prob = mean(prob_stones, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prob_stones, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n_subj = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


pd <- position_dodge(width = 0.75)

ggplot(h6_subject_bin, aes(x = trial_bin, y = prob_stones, fill = Group, group = Group)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Group), 
              position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.12, dodge.width = 0.75), 
              size = 1.6, alpha = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_errorbar(data = summary_df,
                aes(x = trial_bin, y = mean_prob, ymin = mean_prob - se, ymax = mean_prob + se, group = Group),
                width = 0.18,
                position = pd,
                color = "black",
                linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_line(data = summary_df,
            aes(x = trial_bin, y = mean_prob, color = Group, group = Group),
            position = pd,
            linewidth = 0.9,
            alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_point(data = summary_df,
             aes(x = trial_bin, y = mean_prob, group = Group),
             position = pd,
             shape = 23, size = 3, fill = "white", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.7) +
  labs(
    title = "Exp. 2: Subject-level probability of choosing stones by trial bin",
    x = "Trial bin",
    y = "Probability of choosing stones (per subject)",
    fill = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )


h6_subject_bin_stonehigher <- is_not_consistent_chosegems_part1 %>%
  mutate(
    trial_bin = cut(
      trial_num,
      breaks = c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50),
      labels = c("1-10", "11-20", "21-30", "31-40", "41-50"),
      right = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(subj_id, trial_bin, mentioned_rule) %>%
  filter(stone_higher_than_other) %>%
  summarise(
    prob_stones = mean(chose_onlystones_part2, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_trials = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = ifelse(mentioned_rule, "Position mentioned", "Position NOT mentioned"),
    trial_bin = factor(trial_bin, levels = c("1-10","11-20","21-30","31-40","41-50"))
  )

summary_df_stonehigher <- h6_subject_bin_stonehigher %>%
  group_by(trial_bin, Group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prob = mean(prob_stones, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd(prob_stones, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n_subj = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(h6_subject_bin_stonehigher, aes(x = trial_bin, y = prob_stones, fill = Group, group = Group)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Group), 
              position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.12, dodge.width = 0.75), 
              size = 1.6, alpha = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_errorbar(data = summary_df_stonehigher,
                aes(x = trial_bin, y = mean_prob, ymin = mean_prob - se, ymax = mean_prob + se, group = Group),
                width = 0.18,
                position = pd,
                color = "black",
                linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_line(data = summary_df_stonehigher,
            aes(x = trial_bin, y = mean_prob, color = Group, group = Group),
            position = pd,
            linewidth = 0.9,
            alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_point(data = summary_df_stonehigher,
             aes(x = trial_bin, y = mean_prob, group = Group),
             position = pd,
             shape = 23, size = 3, fill = "white", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.7) +
  labs(
    title = "Exp. 2: Subject-level probability of choosing stones by trial bin (stone higher)",
    x = "Trial bin",
    y = "Probability of choosing stones (per subject)",
    fill = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

h6_viz_data <- is_not_consistent_chosegems_part1 %>%

  group_by(subj_id, mentioned_rule) %>%

  summarise(
    n = n(),
    prob_stones = mean(chose_onlystones_part2, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sqrt(prob_stones * (1 - prob_stones) / n) # Std. Error of a proportion
  ) %>%
  
  mutate(
    ci_lower = prob_stones - 1.96 * se,
    ci_upper = prob_stones + 1.96 * se
  ) %>%
  

  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    Group = ifelse(mentioned_rule, "Position mentioned", "Position NOT mentioned")
  )

h6_alltrial <- is_not_consistent_chosegems_part1 %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prob_stones = mean(chose_onlystones_part2, na.rm = TRUE),
    mentioned_rule  = unique(mentioned_rule)
  ) 


ggplot(h6_alltrial, aes(x = mentioned_rule, y = mean_prob_stones, fill = mentioned_rule)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.5, width = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA, color = "gray40") +

  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", 
               shape = 23, size = 4, fill = "white", color = "black") +
  
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", 
               width = 0.2, color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, alpha = 0.5, color = "gray50") +
  
  labs(
    title = "Probability of Choosing Stones by Rule Mention",
    x = "",
    y = "Probability of Choosing Stones",
    fill = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

```

## Exploratory analysis 

### estimates of own performance


```{r correlation, include = FALSE, cache=F}
## Correlation between estimate and actual performance 
# part 1

computer_accuracy <- raw_df %>%
  select(subj_id, trial_num, number_correct_part1_computer_slider, phase)

part_1_data <- phase_1_df %>%
  left_join(computer_accuracy, by=c('subj_id','trial_num'))%>%
  filter( phase == 'part1') %>%
  mutate(
    rewarded = case_when(
      chose_gems | computer_chose_gems ~ TRUE,
      TRUE ~ FALSE
    )
  )


total_chose_gems_part1 <- part_1_data %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  
  summarise(total_gems = sum(chose_gems, na.rm = TRUE)) 

total_rewarded_part1 <- part_1_data %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  
  summarise(total_reward = sum(rewarded, na.rm=T))

computer_total_gems <- part_1_data %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>% 
  
  summarise(total_gems = sum(computer_chose_gems, na.rm=T))

estimate_chose_gems_part1 <- phase_1_df %>% 
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(mean_estimate = mean(number_correct_part1, na.rm = TRUE))

estimate_computer_chose_gems <- part_1_data %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  mutate(number_correct_part1_computer_slider = as.numeric(number_correct_part1_computer_slider)) %>%
  summarise(mean_estimate = mean(number_correct_part1_computer_slider), na.rm=T)

correlation_data_chose_gems <- inner_join(total_chose_gems_part1, 
                               estimate_chose_gems_part1, 
                               by = "subj_id")

correlation_data_rewarded <- inner_join(total_rewarded_part1, estimate_chose_gems_part1, by = 'subj_id')

correlation_data_computer <- inner_join(computer_total_gems, estimate_computer_chose_gems, by='subj_id') 

cor_part1_chose_gems <- cor.test(x = correlation_data_chose_gems$total_gems, 
         y = correlation_data_chose_gems$mean_estimate, 
         method = "pearson")

cor_part1_rewarded  <- cor.test(x = correlation_data_rewarded$total_reward,
                                y = correlation_data_rewarded$mean_estimate,
                                method = "pearson")

cor_part1_computer <- cor.test(x = correlation_data_computer$total_gems,
                               y = correlation_data_computer$mean_estimate,
                               method = "pearson")




# part 2

total_is_consistent_part2 <- phase_2_df %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(consistent = sum(is_consistent, na.rm = TRUE)) 

estimate_chose_gems_part2 <- phase_2_df %>% 
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(mean_estimate = mean(number_correct_part2, na.rm = TRUE))

correlation_data <- inner_join(total_is_consistent_part2, 
                               estimate_chose_gems_part2, 
                               by = "subj_id")

cor_part2 <- cor.test(x = correlation_data$consistent, 
         y = correlation_data$mean_estimate, 
         method = "pearson")


# correlation bbetween probability of choosing gems in part 2 and part 1 estimate 

total_chose_gems_part2 <- phase_2_df %>% 
  group_by(subj_id) %>% 
  summarise(chose_gems = sum(chose_gems, na.rm = T))

cor_part2_part1_data <- inner_join(total_chose_gems_part2,
                                   estimate_chose_gems_part1,
                                   by = "subj_id"
                            )

cor_part2_part1 <- cor.test(x = cor_part2_part1_data$chose_gems,
                            y = cor_part2_part1_data$mean_estimate,
                            method = "pearson")



```


People cannot estimate performance in part 1 (estimating the number of trials in which **they** revealed gems); Pearson correlation `r sprintf("r = %.2f, 95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f]", cor_part1_chose_gems$estimate, cor_part1_chose_gems$conf.int[1], cor_part1_chose_gems$conf.int[2])` p = `r printp(cor_part1_chose_gems$p.value)`. However, people can estimate the number of trials in which they were rewarded; Pearson correlation `r sprintf("r = %.2f, 95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f]", cor_part1_rewarded$estimate, cor_part1_rewarded$conf.int[1], cor_part1_rewarded$conf.int[2])` p `r printp(cor_part1_rewarded$p.value)`. When asked to estimate the performance of the computer, participants fail to do so accurately; Pearson correlation `r sprintf("r = %.2f, 95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f]", cor_part1_computer$estimate, cor_part1_computer$conf.int[1], cor_part1_computer$conf.int[2])` p = `r printp(cor_part1_computer$p.value)`.

In Part 2, they are able to estimate their performance in part 2; Pearson correlation `r sprintf("r = %.2f, 95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f]", cor_part2$estimate,cor_part2$conf.int[1], cor_part2$conf.int[2])` p `r printp(cor_part2$p.value)`. 

Looking at the correlation between choosing gems in part 2 and the estimate for part 1; Pearson correlation `r sprintf("r = %.2f, 95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f]", cor_part2_part1$estimate,cor_part2_part1$conf.int[1], cor_part2_part1$conf.int[2])` p = `r printp(cor_part2_part1$p.value)`.





```{r correlation_plots,  cache=F, fig.width=8}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 13))

plot_correlation_fixed <- function(df, x_col, y_col, x_lab, y_lab, title) {
  df2 <- df %>%
    select({{x_col}}, {{y_col}}) %>%
    rename(x = 1, y = 2) %>%
    filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y))
  if (nrow(df2) < 2) stop("Not enough observations to compute correlation for: ", title)
  ct <- cor.test(df2$x, df2$y, method = "pearson")
  r_val <- unname(ct$estimate)
  p_val <- ct$p.value
  n_val <- nrow(df2)

  p <- ggplot(df2, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
    geom_abline(slope =1, intercept = 0)+
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.8) +
    labs(title = title, x = x_lab, y = y_lab) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 50), ylim = c(0, 50)) + 
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf,
             label = sprintf("r = %.2f\np = %.3g\nn = %d", r_val, p_val, n_val),
             hjust = 1.05, vjust = 1.1, size = 3.6)
  list(plot = p, cor.test = ct, data = df2)
}

total_chose_gems_part1 <- part_1_data %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial) %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(total_gems = sum(chose_gems, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

estimate_chose_gems_part1 <- phase_1_df %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(mean_estimate = mean(number_correct_part1, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

corr_df_1 <- inner_join(total_chose_gems_part1, estimate_chose_gems_part1, by = "subj_id") %>% drop_na()

res_part1_chose <- plot_correlation_fixed(corr_df_1, total_gems, mean_estimate,
                                    x_lab = "Total times participant chose gems (part1)",
                                    y_lab = "Mean estimate (part1)",
                                    title = "Part1: Participant chosen gems vs estimate")
print(res_part1_chose$plot)
print(res_part1_chose$cor.test)

total_rewarded_part1 <- part_1_data %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial) %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(total_reward = sum(rewarded, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

corr_df_2 <- inner_join(total_rewarded_part1, estimate_chose_gems_part1, by = "subj_id") %>% drop_na()

res_part1_reward <- plot_correlation_fixed(corr_df_2, total_reward, mean_estimate,
                                     x_lab = "Total rewarded trials (part1)",
                                     y_lab = "Mean estimate (part1)",
                                     title = "Part1: Rewarded trials vs estimate")
print(res_part1_reward$plot)
print(res_part1_reward$cor.test)

computer_total_gems <- part_1_data %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial) %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(total_gems = sum(computer_chose_gems, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

computer_estimate_per_subj <- part_1_data %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(mean_computer_estimate = mean(as.numeric(number_correct_part1_computer_slider), na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

corr_df_3 <- inner_join(computer_total_gems, computer_estimate_per_subj, by = "subj_id") %>% drop_na()

res_part1_computer <- plot_correlation_fixed(corr_df_3, total_gems, mean_computer_estimate,
                                      x_lab = "Computer: total gem reveals (part1)",
                                      y_lab = "Computer mean estimate (slider)",
                                      title = "Part1: Computer gem reveals vs computer estimate")
print(res_part1_computer$plot)
print(res_part1_computer$cor.test)


total_chose_gems_part2 <- phase_2_df %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial) %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(consistent = sum(is_consistent, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

estimate_chose_gems_part2 <- phase_2_df %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(mean_estimate = mean(number_correct_part2, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

corr_df_4 <- inner_join(total_chose_gems_part2, estimate_chose_gems_part2, by = "subj_id") %>% drop_na()

res_part2 <- plot_correlation_fixed(corr_df_4, consistent, mean_estimate,
                             x_lab = "Total consistent choices (part2)",
                             y_lab = "Mean estimate (part2)",
                             title = "Part2: Consistency vs estimate")
print(res_part2$plot)
print(res_part2$cor.test)

total_chose_gems_part2 <- phase_2_df %>% 
  group_by(subj_id) %>% 
  summarise(chose_gems = sum(chose_gems, na.rm = T))

cor_part2_part1_data <- inner_join(total_chose_gems_part2,
                                   estimate_chose_gems_part1,
                                   by = "subj_id"
                            )



res_part2_part1 <- plot_correlation_fixed(
  cor_part2_part1_data,
  chose_gems,
  mean_estimate,
  x_lab = "Total consistent choices (part2)",
  y_lab = "Mean estimate (part1)",
  title = "Part2: Consistency vs Part1 mean estimate"
)

print(res_part2_part1$plot)
print(res_part2_part1$cor.test)



```


### Effect of numbers on choice

```{r higherorlower, include = FALSE, cache=F}


higher_df_exp3 <- two_parts_df_exp3 %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial, !is_consistent) %>%
  mutate(
    num_chosen = case_when(
      response_position_p2 == "middle" ~ middle_number,
      response_position_p2 == "left" ~ left_number,
      response_position_p2 == "right" ~ right_number
    ),
    num_unchosen = case_when(
      response_position_p2 == "middle" & response_position == "left"  ~ right_number,
      response_position_p2 == "middle" & response_position == "right" ~ left_number,
      
      response_position_p2 == "right" & response_position == "left"   ~ middle_number,
      response_position_p2 == "right" & response_position == "middle" ~ left_number,
      
      response_position_p2 == "left" & response_position == "middle" ~ right_number,
      response_position_p2 == "left" & response_position == "right"  ~ middle_number,
    ))  %>%
  filter(num_chosen != num_unchosen) %>%
  mutate(
    higher = num_chosen>num_unchosen
  ) 

model_exp3 <- glmer(
  higher ~ 1 + (1 | subj_id),
  data = higher_df_exp3,
  family = binomial,
  control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa"))

p_higher_exp3 <- higher_df_exp3 %>% group_by(subj_id) %>% summarise(mean_higher = mean(higher)) %>% pull(mean_higher) %>% mean(na.rm=T)

p_mean_exp3 <- two_parts_df_exp3 %>% 
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial) %>%
  mutate(
    num_chosen = case_when(
      response_position == "middle" ~ middle_number,
      response_position == "left" ~ left_number,
      response_position == "right" ~ right_number
    )
  ) %>%
  summarise(mean_num_chosen = mean(num_chosen)) %>%
  mutate(diff = mean_num_chosen - 3)



```

ppts in exp. 3, mean chosen number `r p_mean_exp3 %>% pull(mean_num_chosen) %>% mean() %>% printnum()`. t-test against 3, `r apa_print(t.test(p_mean_exp3$diff))$statistic`


In exp. 2 p(higher_number) = = `r round(plogis(fixef(model_exp3)[1]), 2)` (β = `r printnum(round(fixef(model_exp3)[1], 2))`, 
SE = `r printnum(round(summary(model_exp3)$coefficients[1, "Std. Error"], 2))`, 
*z* = `r printnum(round(summary(model_exp3)$coefficients[1, "z value"], 2))`, 
*p* `r printp(summary(model_exp3)$coefficients[1, "Pr(>|z|)"])`) 


```{r age,  cache=F, fig.width=8}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Accuracy
participant_accuracy_1 <- merged_data %>%
  filter(phase == 'part1', !is_catch_trial) %>%
  group_by(`Participant id`, Age) %>%
  summarise(participant_acc = mean(chose_gems), .groups = 'drop')

participant_accuracy_2 <- merged_data %>%
  filter(phase == 'part2', !is_catch_trial) %>%
  group_by(`Participant id`, Age) %>%
  summarise(participant_acc = mean(is_consistent), .groups = 'drop')

age_avoid_1 <- merged_data %>%
  filter(phase == 'part1', !is_catch_trial) %>%
  group_by(`Participant id`, Age) %>%
  summarise(participant_avoid = mean(chose_onlystones), .groups = 'drop')

age_avoid_2 <- merged_data %>%
  filter(phase == 'part2', !is_catch_trial) %>%
  group_by(`Participant id`, Age) %>%
  summarise(participant_avoid = mean(chose_onlystones), .groups = 'drop')

age_breaks <- c(17, 22, 27, 32, 37, 42, 47, 52, 57, 62, 67, 72, 77, Inf)
age_labels <- c("18-22", "23-27", "28-32", "33-37", "38-42", "43-47",
                "48-52", "53-57", "58-62", "63-67", "68-72", "73-77", "78+")

combined_participant_data <- bind_rows(
  participant_accuracy_1 %>% mutate(Condition = "Part 1"),
  participant_accuracy_2 %>% mutate(Condition = "Part 2")
)

combined_age_summary <- combined_participant_data %>%
  mutate(
    Age = as.numeric(as.character(Age)),
    AgeBin = cut(Age, breaks = age_breaks, labels = age_labels, right = TRUE, ordered_result = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(AgeBin)) %>%
  group_by(AgeBin, Condition) %>% 
  summarise(
    mean_accuracy = mean(participant_acc),
    se = sd(participant_acc) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

ggplot(combined_age_summary, aes(x = AgeBin, 
                                 y = mean_accuracy, 
                                 group = Condition, 
                                 color = Condition)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_accuracy - se, ymax = mean_accuracy + se),
    width = 0.25, linewidth = 0.8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Part 1" = "blue", "Part 2" = "red")) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Mean Participant Accuracy by Age Bin",
    x = "Age Bin",
    y = "Mean Accuracy",
    color = "Phase" 
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

combined_avoid_data <- bind_rows(
  age_avoid_1 %>% mutate(Condition = "Part 1"),
  age_avoid_2 %>% mutate(Condition = "Part 2")
)

combined_age_summary_avoid <- combined_avoid_data %>%
  mutate(
    Age = as.numeric(as.character(Age)),
    AgeBin = cut(Age, breaks = age_breaks, labels = age_labels, right = TRUE, ordered_result = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(AgeBin)) %>%
  group_by(AgeBin, Condition) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_avoid = mean(participant_avoid), 
    se = sd(participant_avoid) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

ggplot(combined_age_summary_avoid, aes(x = AgeBin, 
                                       y = mean_avoid, 
                                       group = Condition, 
                                       color = Condition)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_avoid - se, ymax = mean_avoid + se), 
    width = 0.25, linewidth = 0.8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Part 1" = "blue", "Part 2" = "red")) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Mean Participant Avoidance by Age Bin",
    x = "Age Bin",
    y = "Mean Avoidance", 
    color = "Phase"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

participant_age_data <- merged_data %>%
  mutate(Age_numeric = as.numeric(as.character(Age))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Age_numeric)) %>%
  distinct(`Participant id`, Age_numeric)

conditions <- phase_1_df %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(subj_id, stoneposition) %>% 
  count(stoneposition)

print(conditions)
  

ggplot(participant_age_data, aes(x = Age_numeric)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, fill = "cornflowerblue", color = "white", alpha = 0.9, boundary = 0) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Participant Age",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Frequency (Count of Participants)" # Updated label
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


```
```{r agebias, cache=F, fig.width=8}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

correlated_data <- inner_join(
  phase_1_acc,
  phase_2_acc,
  by = "subj_id",
  suffix = c("_p1", "_p2") 
)

correlation_test <- cor.test(
  ~ acc_p1 + acc_p2, 
  data = correlated_data
)

print(correlation_test)

ggplot(correlated_data, aes(x = acc_p1, y = acc_p2)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue", fill = "blue", alpha = 0.1) +
  labs(
    title = "Correlation between Phase 1 and Phase 2 Accuracy",
    x = "Phase 1 Accuracy",
    y = "Phase 2 Accuracy"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```
```{r clean_hover_data, cache=F, fig.width = 8}

## Exclude participants who may have used tablets:

sep <- ";"

mouse_long <- raw_df %>%
  filter(!(subj_id %in% participants_to_exclude), trial_type == "testmouse") %>%
  select(subj_id, trial_num, mouse_x, mouse_y, mouse_t) %>%
  mutate(
    mouse_x = if_else(is.na(mouse_x) | mouse_x == "", NA_character_, as.character(mouse_x)),
    mouse_y = if_else(is.na(mouse_y) | mouse_y == "", NA_character_, as.character(mouse_y)),
    mouse_t = if_else(is.na(mouse_t) | mouse_t == "", NA_character_, as.character(mouse_t))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    x_tokens = str_split(mouse_x, pattern = fixed(sep)),
    y_tokens = str_split(mouse_y, pattern = fixed(sep)),
    t_tokens = str_split(mouse_t, pattern = fixed(sep))
  ) %>%
  # require at least some x tokens
  filter(!map_lgl(x_tokens, ~ all(is.na(.x)))) %>%
  mutate(
    n_tokens = pmax(map_int(x_tokens, length),
                    map_int(y_tokens, length),
                    map_int(t_tokens, length))
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(idx = list(seq_len(n_tokens))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  unnest(cols = c(idx)) %>%
  mutate(frame_index = idx) %>%
  mutate(
    x_token = map2_chr(x_tokens, frame_index, ~ if(length(.x) >= .y) .x[[.y]] else NA_character_),
    y_token = map2_chr(y_tokens, frame_index, ~ if(length(.x) >= .y) .x[[.y]] else NA_character_),
    t_token = map2_chr(t_tokens, frame_index, ~ if(length(.x) >= .y) .x[[.y]] else NA_character_)
  ) %>%
  select(subj_id, trial_num, frame_index, x_token, y_token, t_token)

mouse_long <- mouse_long %>%
  mutate(
    mouse_x = as.numeric(str_trim(x_token)),
    mouse_y = as.numeric(str_trim(y_token)),
    mouse_t = as.numeric(str_trim(t_token))
  ) %>%
  select(-x_token, -y_token, -t_token) %>%
  filter(!(is.na(mouse_x) & is.na(mouse_y)))

mouse_movements <- mouse_long %>%
  arrange(subj_id, trial_num, frame_index) %>%
  group_by(subj_id, trial_num) %>%
  mutate(
    x_prev = lag(mouse_x),
    y_prev = lag(mouse_y),
    t_prev = lag(mouse_t),
    dx = as.numeric(mouse_x) - as.numeric(x_prev),
    dy = as.numeric(mouse_y) - as.numeric(y_prev),
    dist = sqrt((dx)^2 + (dy)^2),
    dt = as.numeric(mouse_t) - as.numeric(t_prev),
    speed = ifelse(!is.na(dist) & !is.na(dt) & dt > 0, dist / dt, NA_real_)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

summary(mouse_movements$dist)
quantile(mouse_movements$dist, probs = c(0, 0.5, 0.9, 0.99, 1), na.rm = TRUE)

mouse_movements %>%
  arrange(desc(dist)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20) %>%
  select(subj_id, trial_num, frame_index, mouse_x, mouse_y, x_prev, y_prev, dx, dy, dist) 

subject_maxdist <- mouse_movements %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(
    n_points   = n(),
    n_moves    = sum(!is.na(dist)),
    max_dist   = max(dist, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_dist= median(dist, na.rm = TRUE),
    p99_dist   = quantile(dist, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(max_dist))


p_hist <- ggplot(subject_maxdist, aes(x = median_dist)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 60, boundary = 0, closed = "left", fill = "steelblue", color = "white", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of participants' median frame-to-frame jump",
       x = "median dist (pixels/frame)",
       y = "Number of participants") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

print(p_hist)

tablet_suspects <- subject_maxdist %>%
  filter(median_dist > 150) %>%
  pull(subj_id)

```

```{r hover_data_analysis, cache=F, fig.width = 8}


hover_part1 <- raw_df %>%
  filter(
    !(subj_id %in% participants_to_exclude),
    trial_type == "testmouse",
    phase == 'part1',
    !(subj_id %in% tablet_suspects)
  ) %>%
  select(
    subj_id, 
    trial_num,
    stoneposition,
    left_number, 
    middle_number, 
    right_number,
    is_catch_trial,
    chose_gems,
    chose_other,
    chose_onlystones,
    frames_hover_left,
    frames_hover_middle,
    frames_hover_right,
    frames_hover_none,
    hover_time_left,
    hover_time_middle,
    hover_time_right,
    hover_time_none, 
    mouse_x,
    mouse_y,
    mouse_t,
    mouse_universal_x,
    mouse_universal_y,
    hover_location,
    total_frames,
    correct_choice_position,
    response_position
  ) %>%
  mutate(

    across(starts_with("frames_hover_"), as.numeric),
    across(starts_with("hover_time_"), as.numeric),

    gem_frame_hover = case_when(
      correct_choice_position == "left"   ~ frames_hover_left,
      correct_choice_position == "middle" ~ frames_hover_middle,
      correct_choice_position == "right"  ~ frames_hover_right,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    gem_time_hover = case_when(
      correct_choice_position == "left"   ~ hover_time_left,
      correct_choice_position == "middle" ~ hover_time_middle,
      correct_choice_position == "right"  ~ hover_time_right,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    stone_frame_hover = case_when(
      stoneposition == "left" ~ frames_hover_left,
      stoneposition == "middle" ~ frames_hover_middle,
      stoneposition == "right" ~ frames_hover_right,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    stone_time_hover = case_when(
      stoneposition == "right" ~ hover_time_right,
      stoneposition == "middle" ~ hover_time_middle,
      stoneposition == "left" ~ hover_time_left,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    other_frame_hover = case_when(
      stoneposition == "left" & correct_choice_position == "middle" ~ frames_hover_right,
      stoneposition == "left" & correct_choice_position == "right" ~ frames_hover_middle,
      stoneposition == "middle" & correct_choice_position == "right" ~ frames_hover_left,
      stoneposition == "middle" & correct_choice_position == "left" ~ frames_hover_right,
      stoneposition == "right" & correct_choice_position == "middle" ~ frames_hover_left,
      stoneposition == "right" & correct_choice_position == "left" ~ frames_hover_middle,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    other_time_hover = case_when(
      stoneposition == "left" & correct_choice_position == "middle" ~ hover_time_right,
      stoneposition == "left" & correct_choice_position == "right" ~ hover_time_middle,
      stoneposition == "middle" & correct_choice_position == "right" ~ hover_time_left,
      stoneposition == "middle" & correct_choice_position == "left" ~ hover_time_right,
      stoneposition == "right" & correct_choice_position == "middle" ~ hover_time_left,
      stoneposition == "right" & correct_choice_position == "left" ~ hover_time_middle,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
    
  )

hover_part2 <- raw_df %>%
  filter(
    !(subj_id %in% participants_to_exclude),
    trial_type == "testmouse",
    phase == 'part2',
    !(subj_id %in% tablet_suspects)
  ) %>%
  select(
    subj_id, 
    trial_num,
    stoneposition,
    left_number, 
    middle_number, 
    right_number,
    is_catch_trial,
    chose_gems,
    chose_other,
    chose_onlystones,
    frames_hover_left,
    frames_hover_middle,
    frames_hover_right,
    frames_hover_none,
    hover_time_left,
    hover_time_middle,
    hover_time_right,
    hover_time_none, 
    mouse_x,
    mouse_y,
    mouse_t,
    mouse_universal_x,
    mouse_universal_y,
    hover_location,
    total_frames,
    correct_choice_position,
    is_consistent,
    response_position
  ) 


part1_positions <- phase_1_df %>%
  mutate(
    gem_position   = correct_choice_position,
    stone_position = stoneposition,
    other_position = map2_chr(gem_position, stone_position, ~ {
      setdiff(c("left", "middle", "right"), c(.x, .y))[1]
    }),
    computer_response_position = computer_response_position,
    correct_choice_position_part1 = correct_choice_position
  ) %>%
  select(subj_id, trial_num, gem_position, stone_position, other_position,
         computer_response_position, correct_choice_position_part1)

  
hover_part2 <- hover_part2 %>% 
  left_join(part1_positions, by = c('subj_id', 'trial_num'))

hover_part2 <- hover_part2 %>% 
  mutate(

    across(starts_with("frames_hover_"), as.numeric),
    across(starts_with("hover_time_"), as.numeric),

    is_consistent_frame_hover = case_when(
      correct_choice_position == "left"   ~ frames_hover_left,
      correct_choice_position == "middle" ~ frames_hover_middle,
      correct_choice_position == "right"  ~ frames_hover_right,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    is_consistent_time_hover = case_when(
      correct_choice_position == "left"   ~ hover_time_left,
      correct_choice_position == "middle" ~ hover_time_middle,
      correct_choice_position == "right"  ~ hover_time_right,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    stone_frame_hover = case_when(
      stoneposition == "left" ~ frames_hover_left,
      stoneposition == "middle" ~ frames_hover_middle,
      stoneposition == "right" ~ frames_hover_right,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    stone_time_hover = case_when(
      stoneposition == "right" ~ hover_time_right,
      stoneposition == "middle" ~ hover_time_middle,
      stoneposition == "left" ~ hover_time_left,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    gem_frame_hover = case_when(
      correct_choice_position_part1 == 'left' ~ frames_hover_left,
      correct_choice_position_part1 == 'middle' ~ frames_hover_middle,
      correct_choice_position_part1 == 'right' ~ frames_hover_right
    ),
    gem_time_hover = case_when(
      correct_choice_position_part1 == 'left' ~ hover_time_left,
      correct_choice_position_part1 == "middle" ~ hover_time_middle,
      correct_choice_position_part1 == 'right' ~ hover_time_right
    ),
    other_frame_hover = case_when(
      stoneposition == "left" & correct_choice_position_part1 == "middle" ~ frames_hover_right,
      stoneposition == "left" & correct_choice_position_part1 == "right" ~ frames_hover_middle,
      stoneposition == "middle" & correct_choice_position_part1 == "right" ~ frames_hover_left,
      stoneposition == "middle" & correct_choice_position_part1 == "left" ~ frames_hover_right,
      stoneposition == "right" & correct_choice_position_part1 == "middle" ~ frames_hover_left,
      stoneposition == "right" & correct_choice_position_part1 == "left" ~ frames_hover_middle,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    other_time_hover = case_when(
      stoneposition == "left" & correct_choice_position_part1 == "middle" ~ hover_time_right,
      stoneposition == "left" & correct_choice_position_part1== "right" ~ hover_time_middle,
      stoneposition == "middle" & correct_choice_position_part1 == "right" ~ hover_time_left,
      stoneposition == "middle" & correct_choice_position_part1== "left" ~ hover_time_right,
      stoneposition == "right" & correct_choice_position_part1== "middle" ~ hover_time_left,
      stoneposition == "right" & correct_choice_position_part1== "left" ~ hover_time_middle,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    
  )


hover_part1_joined <- hover_part1 %>%
  left_join(part1_positions, by = c("subj_id", "trial_num"))

hover1_plot_df <- hover_part1_joined %>%
  mutate(
    across(starts_with("hover_time_"), as.numeric),

    consistent_slot = case_when(
      chose_gems   ~ "gem",
      chose_onlystones ~ "stone",
      chose_other ~ "other",
      TRUE                                ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(gem_time_hover, stone_time_hover, other_time_hover),
    names_to = "hovered_item",
    values_to = "hover_time"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    hovered_item = recode(hovered_item,
                          gem_time_hover   = "gem",
                          stone_time_hover = "stone",
                          other_time_hover = "other"),
    consistent_slot = factor(consistent_slot,
                             levels = c("gem","stone","other"),
                             labels = c("chose gems", "chose stones", "chose other")),
    hovered_item = factor(hovered_item, levels = c("gem","stone","other"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(consistent_slot), !is.na(hover_time))


summary_hover1 <- hover1_plot_df %>%
  group_by(consistent_slot, hovered_item) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_hover = mean(hover_time, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_hover   = sd(hover_time, na.rm = TRUE),
    n          = sum(!is.na(hover_time)),
    se_hover   = sd_hover / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(se_hover = ifelse(n <= 1, NA_real_, se_hover))

pd <- position_dodge(width = 0.7)

ggplot(summary_hover1, aes(x = consistent_slot, y = mean_hover, fill = hovered_item, group = hovered_item)) +
  geom_col(position = pd, width = 0.6, alpha = 0.95) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_hover - 1.96 * se_hover, ymax = mean_hover + 1.96 * se_hover),
                position = pd, width = 0.2, color = "black") +
  labs(
    x = "", y = "Mean hover time (ms)", fill = "Hovered item",
    title = "Hover time in part 1 by chosen position and box type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

hover_plot_df <- hover_part2 %>%
  mutate(
    consistent_slot = case_when(
      response_position == gem_position   ~ "consistent_is_gem",
      response_position == stone_position ~ "consistent_is_stone",
      response_position == other_position ~ "consistent_is_other",
      TRUE                                ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(gem_time_hover, stone_time_hover, other_time_hover),
    names_to = "hovered_item",
    values_to = "hover_time"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    hovered_item = recode(hovered_item,
                          gem_time_hover   = "gem",
                          stone_time_hover = "stone",
                          other_time_hover = "other"),
    consistent_slot = factor(consistent_slot,
                             levels = c("consistent_is_gem","consistent_is_stone","consistent_is_other"),
                             labels = c("is_consistent = gem", "is_consistent = stone", "is_consistent = other")),
    hovered_item = factor(hovered_item, levels = c("gem","stone","other"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(consistent_slot), !is.na(hover_time))


summary_hover <- hover_plot_df %>%
  group_by(consistent_slot, hovered_item) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_hover = mean(hover_time, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_hover   = sd(hover_time, na.rm = TRUE),
    n         = sum(!is.na(hover_time)),
    se_hover  = sd_hover / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pd <- position_dodge(width = 0.7)

ggplot(summary_hover, aes(x = consistent_slot, y = mean_hover, fill = hovered_item, group = hovered_item)) +
  geom_col(position = pd, width = 0.6, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_hover - 1.96 * se_hover, ymax = mean_hover + 1.96 * se_hover),
                position = pd, width = 0.2, color = "black") +
  labs(
    x = "", y = "Mean hover time (ms)", fill = "Hovered box type",
    title = "Hover time in part 2 by correct position and box type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")




```



```{r i_revealed_gems, cache = F}


acc_by_condition <- phase_1_df %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial) %>%
  mutate(
    condition = case_when(
      chose_gems ~ "self",
      computer_chose_gems ~ "computer",
      !chose_gems & !computer_chose_gems ~ "none"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(condition)) %>%
  inner_join(
    phase_2_df %>%
      filter(!is_catch_trial) %>%
      select(subj_id, trial_num, is_consistent),
    by = c("subj_id", "trial_num")
  ) %>%
  group_by(subj_id, condition, mentioned_rule) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_acc = mean(is_consistent)
  )

acc_wide <- acc_by_condition %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = condition,
    values_from = mean_acc
  )

library(lme4)

self_vs_computer <- phase_1_df %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial) %>%
  mutate(
    condition = case_when(
      chose_gems ~ "self",
      computer_chose_gems ~ "computer",
      !chose_gems & !computer_chose_gems ~ "none"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(condition %in% c("self", "computer")) %>%  
  inner_join(
    phase_2_df %>%
      filter(!is_catch_trial) %>%
      select(subj_id, trial_num, is_consistent, confidence),
    by = c("subj_id", "trial_num")
  ) %>%
  mutate(conf_prop = as.numeric(confidence) / 100)


model <- glmer(
  is_consistent ~ condition + (1 | subj_id),
  data = self_vs_computer,
  family = binomial,
  control = glmerControl(
    optimizer = "bobyqa"
  )
)

summary(model)

library(emmeans)
emms <- emmeans(model, ~ condition, type = "response")





t.test(
  acc_wide$self,
  acc_wide$computer,
  paired = TRUE
)

  
t_self_vs_com_rule_true <- acc_wide %>%
  filter(mentioned_rule == TRUE) %>%
  with(
    t.test(self, computer, paired = TRUE)
  )

t_self_vs_com_rule_true

t_self_vs_com_rule_false <- acc_wide %>%
  filter(mentioned_rule == FALSE) %>%
  with(
    t.test(self, computer, paired = TRUE)
  )

t_self_vs_com_rule_false

library(lme4)

lmm <- lmer(
  mean_acc ~ condition  + (1 | subj_id),
  data = acc_by_condition
)

anova(lmm)

library(emmeans)
emmeans(lmm, pairwise ~ condition)



```

We tested the hypothesis that participants are equally accurate when they chose the gems in part 1 and when the computer chose the gems in part 1 using a mixed-effects logistic regression model predicting consistency
(is_consistent ~ condition + (1 | subj_id)).There was no significant effect of who chose the gems on accuracy. When the computer chose the gems, estimated accuracy was `r printnum(round(plogis(fixef(model)[1]), 2))`,
compared to `r printnum(round(plogis(fixef(model)[2] + fixef(model)[1]), 2))` when the participant chose the gems.

The fixed effect of condition (computer vs. self) was not significant, Beta = `r printnum(round(fixef(model)[2],2))`, SE = `r printnum(round(summary(model)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"], 2))`, *z* = `r printnum(round(summary(model)$coefficients[2, "z value"], 2))`, *p* `r printp(summary(model)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|z|)"])`.

The corresponding odds ratio was OR = `r printnum(round(exp(fixef(model)[2]), 2))`, 95% CI [`r printnum(round(exp(confint(model, parm = 2, method = "Wald")[1]), 2))`, `r printnum(round(exp(confint(model, parm = 2, method = "Wald")[2]), 2))`].


```{r rewarded, cache=F}

chose_gems_p2_by_condition <- phase_1_df %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial) %>%
  mutate(
    condition = case_when(
      chose_gems ~ NA_character_,
      computer_chose_gems ~ "computer",
      !chose_gems & !computer_chose_gems ~ "none"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(condition)) %>%
  inner_join(
    phase_2_df %>%
      filter(!is_catch_trial) %>%
      mutate(p2_chose_gems = chose_gems) %>%
      select(subj_id, trial_num, p2_chose_gems),
    by = c("subj_id", "trial_num")
  ) %>%
  group_by(subj_id, condition, mentioned_rule) %>%
  summarise(
     prob_gems= mean(p2_chose_gems),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

gems_wide <- chose_gems_p2_by_condition %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = condition,
    values_from = prob_gems
  )

t.test(
  gems_wide$none,
  gems_wide$computer,
  paired = TRUE
)

  
t_none_vs_com_rule_true <- gems_wide %>%
  filter(mentioned_rule == TRUE) %>%
  with(
    t.test(none, computer, paired = TRUE)
  )

t_self_vs_com_rule_true

t_self_vs_com_rule_false <- gems_wide %>%
  filter(mentioned_rule == FALSE) %>%
  with(
    t.test(none, computer, paired = TRUE)
  )

t_self_vs_com_rule_false

computer_vs_none <- phase_1_df %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial) %>%
  mutate(
    condition = case_when(
      chose_gems ~ "self",
      computer_chose_gems ~ "computer",
      !chose_gems & !computer_chose_gems ~ "none"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(condition %in% c("none", "computer")) %>%  
  inner_join(
    phase_2_df %>%
      filter(!is_catch_trial) %>%
      mutate(p2_chose_gems = chose_gems) %>%
      select(subj_id, trial_num, p2_chose_gems),
    by = c("subj_id", "trial_num")
  )


model <- glmer(
  p2_chose_gems ~ condition + (1 | subj_id),
  data = computer_vs_none,
  family = binomial,
  control = glmerControl(
    optimizer = "bobyqa"
  )
)

summary(model)

library(emmeans)

emmeans(model, ~ condition, type = "response")

```

We tested the hypothesis that participants are equally likely to choose the gems option in part 2 when no one chose gems in part 1 and when the computer chose the gems in part 1 using a mixed-effects logistic regression model predicting consistency
(p2_chose_gems ~ condition + (1 | subj_id)).There was no significant effect of who chose the gems on accuracy. When the computer chose the gems, the estimated probability of choosing gems was `r printnum(round(plogis(fixef(model)[1]), 2))`,
compared to `r printnum(round(plogis(fixef(model)[2] + fixef(model)[1]), 2))` when the no one chose the gems.

The fixed effect of condition (computer vs. no one) was not significant, Beta = `r printnum(round(fixef(model)[2],2))`, SE = `r printnum(round(summary(model)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"], 2))`, *z* = `r printnum(round(summary(model)$coefficients[2, "z value"], 2))`, *p* `r printp(summary(model)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|z|)"])`.

The corresponding odds ratio was OR = `r printnum(round(exp(fixef(model)[2]), 2))`, 95% CI [`r printnum(round(exp(confint(model, parm = 2, method = "Wald")[1]), 2))`, `r printnum(round(exp(confint(model, parm = 2, method = "Wald")[2]), 2))`].





# Results

# Discussion


\newpage

# References

::: {#refs custom-style="Bibliography"}
:::
